name_romaji: Tōkyō Rikugun Shōnen Tsūshinhei Gakkō atochi
name_en: Former Site of the Tokyo Army Youth Signal Corps School
description_en: A former site (kyūseki) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Higashimurayama City, with designation dated February 4, 2011. It covers designated lots in Fujimichō 1-chōme (lots 2-5, 7-10, 12-14, and 16) and 2-chōme (lots 1, part of 2, and 3-10), Higashimurayama City.

name_en: Ceramics Excavated from the Kumano Shrine Site
